title: Lophiolepis ciliata
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Lophiolepis ciliata to provide the requested information.
taxonomy: Lophiolepis ciliata is a species of plant in the family Aspleniaceae. It belongs to the genus Lophiolepis. This plant is further classified as a member of the class Polypodiopsida, which comprises the ferns. The order of this species is Polypodiales, and the family Aspleniaceae is a group of ferns commonly known as the maidenhair ferns. At the rank of order, it is part of the subclass Polypodiidae.
preparations: I couldn't find any information on herbal preparations for Lophiolepis ciliata.
